## ERT1.3. Rate of using available airspace structures (PI#11) {#ert1.3.-rate-of-using-available-airspace-structures-pi11 .Heading-2-ER}

CZECH Republic reports that: (Data source NM)

- the ratio of the use of the available airspace structures is **47%** (via available restricted and segregated airspaces)

- the ratio of the use of the available airspace structures is **74%** (via available conditional routes)

CZECH Republic reports that there is no data available
